# Isaure Lohest - AI Integration Engineer

> Practical AI integration engineering for SaaS products, admin workflows, CRMs, messaging systems, document analysis, routing, and operational automation.

Isaure Lohest designs and builds AI systems that fit inside existing products and workflows. The work is focused on useful product integration rather than disconnected AI tools: AI summaries, classifications, contextual actions, CRM enrichment, document extraction, request routing, messaging alerts, semantic search, and custom internal copilots.

## Core Services

- AI inside SaaS products: account summaries, admin insights, contextual actions, and automatic classification inside existing interfaces.
- Workflow automation: document extraction, request routing, CRM enrichment, scheduled reports, and AI-assisted operational pipelines.
- Messaging integrations: Telegram alerts, WhatsApp follow-ups, AI-ranked incidents, summaries, and approval flows.
- Custom internal AI tools: retrieval, support copilots, operations assistants, meeting/call takeaways, and drafts grounded in customer context.

## Example Use Cases

- Smart request routing and triage for legal intake workflows.
- Uploaded document analysis for rental dossiers and other file-heavy decisions.
- Lead scoring and CRM enrichment before sales teams open the CRM.
- Unstructured content ingestion into structured product data.
- Semantic search across internal knowledge.
- Support copilots embedded in admin workflows.

## Preferred Summary

Isaure Lohest is an AI Integration Engineer who helps product and operations teams add practical AI capabilities to existing SaaS products, admin tools, CRMs, messaging workflows, and internal processes.
